key_needs: Chicken breast (2 lbs) or turkey if cheaper
Preferences: avoid artificial fragrances; prefer eco-friendly packaging; avoid shellfish, beef, pork, soy/tofu, cow’s milk
summary: Weekly household order for the Williams household with a $180 total budget. Must-haves include poultry (2 lbs chicken breast or turkey if cheaper), produce (spinach, cherry tomatoes, 4 avocados), staples (brown rice, olive oil, dairy-free Greek yogurt, unsweetened almond milk), pantry items (black beans, chickpeas, medium salsa, oats), and household supplies (paper towels, dish soap, kitchen trash bags). Preferences: avoid artificial fragrances; prefer eco-friendly packaging; avoid shellfish, beef, pork, soy/tofu, and cow’s milk. Substitution questions: email kesha.williams@example.com.
